title: 10 Signs You Need a Brother, Not Just a Feed
caption:
The feed can give you a lot.

A brother can give you what the feed never will — someone who picks up when you relapse, someone who names your drift before you do, someone who knows the whole guy.

Most men mistake an audience for accountability. If you've been processing everything alone, this one's for you.

"Where there is no guidance, a people falls, but in an abundance of counselors there is safety." — Proverbs 11:14

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #accountability #mensministry #disciplemaking
